# Overlay Types

**API Collection**

A layer level.

## Constants

- **IKOverlayTypeBackground**: A background.
- **IKOverlayTypeImage**: An image.

## Constants

- **Tool Modes**: Image Kit tools modes referenced by the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageView/currentToolMode] property.
